requirement_topic.en: EMC and Electrical Safety — no CE marking; SLS/IEC-based evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与电气安全——无CE标志；以SLS/IEC证据为基础
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容與電氣安全——無CE標誌；以SLS/IEC證據為基礎

summary.en: Sri Lanka does not use EU CE marking. Electrical-safety and electromagnetic-compatibility expectations are met through SLS standards (which adopt the corresponding IEC/CISPR standards) rather than the EU LVD/EMC Directive framework. The mains nominal supply is 230 V, 50 Hz; the 50 Hz frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, so any mains-connected charger or adapter must be rated and tested for 230 V operation. Where the product or its host appliance is within an SLSI regulated/import-inspection scope, conformity to the applicable SLS electrical-safety and EMC standards and the SLS mark may be required for import and sale.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡不使用欧盟CE标志。电气安全与电磁兼容的要求通过SLS标准满足（SLS标准采纳相应的IEC/CISPR标准），而非欧盟LVD/EMC指令框架。市电标称供电为230 V、50 Hz；50 Hz频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的220 V单相/380 V三相，因此任何接入市电的充电器或适配器须按230 V运行进行额定与测试。当产品或其搭载电器属于SLSI受监管/进口检验范围时，符合适用SLS电气安全与EMC标准并取得SLS标志可能成为进口和销售的条件。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡不使用歐盟CE標誌。電氣安全與電磁兼容的要求通過SLS標準滿足（SLS標準採納相應的IEC/CISPR標準），而非歐盟LVD/EMC指令框架。市電標稱供電為230 V、50 Hz；50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的220 V單相/380 V三相，因此任何接入市電的充電器或適配器須按230 V運行進行額定與測試。當產品或其搭載電器屬於SLSI受監管/進口檢驗範圍時，符合適用SLS電氣安全與EMC標準並取得SLS標誌可能成為進口和銷售的條件。

standards_or_laws: SLS standards adopting IEC electrical-safety standards (for example IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 for adapters and host equipment, as adopted into the SLS catalogue)
SLS standards adopting CISPR/IEC EMC standards (for example CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 family) for emissions and immunity
Sri Lanka Standards Institution Act No. 6 of 1984 (SLS mark and conformity assessment)

summary.en: China controls electrical safety and EMC of in-scope products through GB national standards and, for catalogue products, CCC certification (which bundles GB electrical-safety and GB/T EMC requirements). Chinese mains is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. A CCC certificate or GB test report demonstrates Chinese compliance but is not recognised as Sri Lankan conformity, and the 220 V design basis must be re-verified for Sri Lanka's 230 V supply.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB国家标准控制受监管产品的电气安全与电磁兼容，对目录产品适用CCC认证（CCC将GB电气安全与GB/T电磁兼容要求合并）。中国市电为220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz。CCC证书或GB测试报告证明中国符合性，但不被认可为斯里兰卡合格评定，且220 V设计基准须针对斯里兰卡230 V供电重新核实。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB國家標準控制受監管產品的電氣安全與電磁兼容，對目錄產品適用CCC認證（CCC將GB電氣安全與GB/T電磁兼容要求合併）。中國市電為220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz。CCC證書或GB測試報告證明中國符合性，但不被認可為斯里蘭卡合格評定，且220 V設計基準須針對斯里蘭卡230 V供電重新核實。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 / GB 17625-series and related GB EMC standards (electrical safety and EMC for IT/AV equipment)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) where the end product is in the CCC catalogue

gap.en: Key gaps: (1) CE marking is irrelevant for Sri Lanka — evidence must be against SLS/IEC/CISPR standards, not the EU LVD/EMC Directives; (2) Chinese mains design at 220 V must be confirmed for 230 V nominal supply (50 Hz is shared, so frequency is not a gap); (3) CCC certification is not transferable to SLSI; where the item is within an SLSI regulated/import-inspection scope, SLS electrical-safety and EMC conformity plus the SLS mark are additional steps. Because most power banks charge over USB at low voltage, the mains gap typically attaches to the bundled adapter rather than the battery itself.
gap.zh: 主要差距：（1）CE标志对斯里兰卡无意义——证据须依据SLS/IEC/CISPR标准，而非欧盟LVD/EMC指令；（2）中国220 V市电设计须针对230 V标称供电确认（50 Hz相同，故频率不构成差距）；（3）CCC认证不可转用于SLSI；当产品处于SLSI受监管/进口检验范围时，SLS电气安全与EMC合格评定及SLS标志属于额外步骤。由于多数移动电源以USB低电压充电，市电差距通常归于随附适配器而非电池本身。
gap.zht: 主要差距：（1）CE標誌對斯里蘭卡無意義——證據須依據SLS/IEC/CISPR標準，而非歐盟LVD/EMC指令；（2）中國220 V市電設計須針對230 V標稱供電確認（50 Hz相同，故頻率不構成差距）；（3）CCC認證不可轉用於SLSI；當產品處於SLSI受監管/進口檢驗範圍時，SLS電氣安全與EMC合格評定及SLS標誌屬於額外步驟。由於多數行動電源以USB低電壓充電，市電差距通常歸於隨附適配器而非電池本身。

mandatory_status.target: No CE marking in Sri Lanka — SLS/IEC/CISPR-based electrical-safety and EMC evidence applies; SLS mark and conformity may be mandatory where the product or host appliance is within an SLSI regulated/import-inspection scope; design must suit 230 V, 50 Hz supply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB electrical-safety/EMC standards and CCC certification required for catalogue products at 220 V, 50 Hz

source.publisher: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) — Product Certification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking does not apply in Sri Lanka. Demonstrate electrical safety and EMC against the relevant SLS standards (which adopt IEC/CISPR), confirm any mains adapter is rated for 230 V, 50 Hz, and obtain the SLS mark where the product or host appliance is within an SLSI regulated scope. Chinese CCC and GB evidence support engineering analysis but are not Sri Lankan conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CE标志不适用于斯里兰卡。应依据相关SLS标准（采纳IEC/CISPR）证明电气安全与电磁兼容，确认任何市电适配器按230 V、50 Hz额定，并在产品或搭载电器处于SLSI受监管范围时取得SLS标志。中国CCC与GB证据可支持工程分析，但不构成斯里兰卡合格评定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CE標誌不適用於斯里蘭卡。應依據相關SLS標準（採納IEC/CISPR）證明電氣安全與電磁兼容，確認任何市電適配器按230 V、50 Hz額定，並在產品或搭載電器處於SLSI受監管範圍時取得SLS標誌。中國CCC與GB證據可支持工程分析，但不構成斯里蘭卡合格評定。
